commands.name: list

options.name: --issuer-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment
variable name (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)

options.name: --key-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID'
environment variable)

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or
environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

commands.description: Lists App Store Connect bundle identifiers (app IDs)

commands.name: create

options.name: --common-name
options.description: Optional common name for the CSR

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output path (file or directory) to save the
certificate pfx/pkcs12

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Optional passphrase for the output pfx/pkcs12

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Private Key Filename or Base64
string

commands.description:
Creates a new signing certificate via App Store 
Connect

commands.name: base64-to-file

options.name: --base64
options.description:
Base64 string value or environment variable name
with base64 string value

commands.description:
Decodes base64 data from environment variable or 
string to file

commands.name: deprovision
commands.description:
Cleans up CI environment (removes temporary keychain 
and certificates)

commands.name: env-to-file

options.name: --decode-base64
options.description:
Input is a base64 encoded string and should be
decoded to save as a binary file

commands.description:
Writes environment variable value directly to file (no
base64 decoding)

commands.name: provision

options.name: --api-issuer-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment
variable name (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)

options.name: --api-key-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID'
environment variable)

options.name: --api-private-key
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or
environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

options.name: --api-private-key-dir
options.description:
Specifies a path to save the AppStoreConnect
Private Key (.p8) file to if --install-api-private-key is true.  Default
directory path is "~/private_keys/".

options.name: --bundle-identifier
options.description:
App bundle identifier(s) to match provisioning
profiles for

options.name: --certificate
options.description:
Base64 encoded certificate data, certificate
filename, or environment variable name with base 64 encoded certificate data

options.name: --install-api-private-key
options.description:
If true, installs the --api-private-key
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) (if specified) to the --api-private-key-dir
location.  You are responsible for removing this key if you do not want it to
persist.

options.name: --intermediatecertificate
options.description:
Base64 encoded root ww authority data, certificate
filename, or environment variable name with base 64 encoded certificate data

options.name: --profile-path
options.description:
Override default directory to save downloaded
profiles to

options.name: --profile-type
options.description: Provisioning profile type(s) to match / download

options.name: --rootcacertificate
options.description:
Base64 encoded root ca certificate data,
certificate filename, or environment variable name with base 64 encoded
certificate data

commands.description:
Sets up CI environment with certificates, keychain, 
and provisioning profiles
examples:
ci provision --certificate IOS_CERT_BASE64 --bundle-identifier 
com.myapp.id --app-store-connect-key-id ABC123DEF4 --app-store-connect-issuer-id
12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012 --app-store-connect-private-key 
ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64

commands.name: secret
commands.description:
Converts certificates/keys to base64 for secure CI 
storage
